name: Be not afraid
description:
''Be not afraid''

Last Christmas Eve has been a total disaster, your woes too heavy to burden. So, in the end, you made a wish that wasn't even uttered, and something heard your unspoken prayers.

Yet it is not what you expected.

Notes: This is my take on an angel, have fun. Non-horny bot, eerie but non-lethal. I tried to upload this yesterday but the page was acting funny, so here it is again.

Edit: The stupid ass AI detector flagged this image as innapropiate. What the actual ?

Tags: Otherworld, Cosmic, Galaxy, Weird, Help, Love, Monster, Non-human, Support
creator: hitpun
